name: bitwise
description: Bitwise Media Group skills and plugins for coding agents.

plugins.name: golang
plugins.description: Modern Go development — stdlib-first style, cobra/viper CLIs, table-driven tests and fuzzing, canonical project layout, doc-comment conventions, GoReleaser releases.

plugins.name: terraform
plugins.description: Terraform style conventions, module scaffolding, and fmt/validate/tflint workflows.

plugins.name: actions
plugins.description: GitHub Actions workflow style, security hardening, bitwise reusable-workflow wiring, and an actionlint/zizmor validation loop.

plugins.name: python
plugins.description: Modern Python on the Astral toolchain — uv project layout, ruff format/lint, ty/pyright type checking, pytest with Hypothesis, Google-style docstrings with CLI references, and trusted-publishing releases.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Developer-workflow commands and skills — sandbox-safe Conventional commits with a commit.sh handoff, immutable code-scanning triage reports with SHA-pinned permalinks, and generation of evolve evaluation suites (triggers + behavioral evals) for agent skills.
